table.label: Table
table.description: Use when a side-by-side comparison, shortlist, or attribute matrix would make the article more usable.

checklist.label: Checklist
checklist.description: Use when readers need a before-you-apply, before-you-sign, or before-you-reply review list.

decision_grid.label: Decision Grid
decision_grid.description: Use when the article benefits from mapping deal situations to recommended creator actions.

callout.label: Callout
callout.description: Use when one short warning, caution, or tactical reminder deserves a visual interruption.

visual_brief.label: Visual Brief
visual_brief.description: Use sparingly when a workflow or comparison would benefit from a future explainer illustration.

visualBriefPolicy.note: For now, visual briefs should render as a structured markdown callout rather than triggering a second generated illustration.
